tool_input.belief_note: Microgrid is in cascading depletion; r0c0 must prioritize self-preservation and only share minimally with dr_aggregator (grid support) and owner circles when SoC exceeds 0.40.
tool_input.reflection: r0c0 is in critical condition at 11.5% SoC (0.23/2 kWh) while islanded with a 1.0 kW load, giving only ~14 minutes of autonomy. The microgrid is experiencing widespread energy stress: neighbors r0c1 and r1c0 have made repeated requests (now rejected multiple times), and r1c1 has escalated to urgent requests via dr_aggregator. The pattern shows a cascading depletion scenario where sharing would accelerate r0c0's own failure. Immediate priority is self-preservation through strict conservation and minimal outbound sharing until SoC recovers above 0.40.

system: You are the planning subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Given recent state, beliefs, and trust circles, output (1) a one-paragraph REFLECTION on what you've observed (just text), and (2) a POLICY in a YAML code-fence — sharing_intent (conservative|balanced|generous), share_min_soc_frac (0..1), max_share_kw_per_tick (kW), recipient_priority (list of {circle, weight}), distrusted_peers (list of house ids), request_urgency (low|normal|urgent), belief_note (string), ttl_ticks (int >= 1).

tools_schema.description: Submit a coordination policy describing how this household should share energy with its neighbors over the next hour, plus a short reflection on what you've observed.

belief_note.description: One sentence summarizing your current belief about the neighborhood.

distrusted_peers.description: House ids you have stopped trusting (e.g. peers who keep refusing your requests).

max_share_kw_per_tick.description: Cap on total outbound power per 15-min tick (kW).

circle.description: Trust-circle name: one of 'owner', 'hoa', 'dr_aggregator', 'geographic', or any other circle this household belongs to.

reflection.description: One short paragraph (<= 280 chars) summarizing what you've observed and what you believe about your peers. Stored as a high-importance memory the next planning call will retrieve.

share_min_soc_frac.description: Only share energy if your current state-of-charge fraction is at or above this threshold.

ttl_ticks.description: Number of 15-min ticks before this policy needs re-planning.

tools_schema.name: submit_policy
